entries.title: Review upstream OpenUI changes for selective port candidates
entries.sourceEvidence: upstream remote https://github.com/wandb/openui.git plus reviewed upstream release notes or commit evidence
entries.whyNow: Convert upstream doctrine into an executable review cadence instead of leaving it as maintainer memory.
entries.rollbackPath: Close or defer the item without code adoption when no safe selective-port candidate is found.

entries.title: Intake security-relevant upstream fixes through targeted adoption
entries.sourceEvidence: upstream security fix release notes, commit SHA, or defect report tied to a concrete upstream surface
entries.whyNow: Keep urgent upstream fixes on the same governed path instead of reverting to whole-repo merge habits.
entries.rollbackPath: Revert the selective adoption branch, restore prior upstream evidence, and rerun upstream governance gates.
